pageContext.name: Be@rbrick The Rolling Stones Lips & Tongue (Black Chrome Version) 100% & 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick The Rolling Stones Lips & Tongue (Black Chrome Version) 100% & 400% Collectible Set!  These figures stand at 11.02' and 2.75' tall and feature an all-over black chrome paint with one of the most iconic logos from one of the most popular bands known to man, The Rolling Stones! You can always spot the logo of a mouth with red lips and tongue sticking out from miles away.  Don't miss your chance to add this Be@rbrick collectible set to your collection today!
